name: my-wispr-npm
description: Server-side real-time speech-to-text for Node.js — pipe any PCM stream (e.g. from a WebSocket) into whisper.cpp. Powers the Web SaaS pattern: browser mic → WebSocket → your server → instant transcription.

scripts.test: node -e "const { createWisprStream } = require('.'); console.log('OK — createWisprStream is', typeof createWisprStream);"

author: sainideep1234
